---
title: "Bylaws"
---

The **EnviBayes** section operates under ISBA governance. Formal **bylaws** for the section are linked from the [ISBA Environmental Sciences (EnviBayes) section page](https://bayesian.org/sectionschapters/environmental-sciences/) (see **BYLAWS** on that page).

In general, ISBA sections:

- align officer roles and elections with the [ISBA constitution and bylaws](https://bayesian.org/governance/);
- set section membership dues subject to ISBA Board approval;
- report section activities to ISBA as required.

If anything on this site disagrees with the published ISBA materials, **the ISBA website is authoritative**.
